lines.speaker: Tomas
lines.line: You're here early. Got work or just noise?

lines.speaker: EVE
lines.line: Work, obviously. Unlike you, I don't waste time on sentiment—though I guess you're stuck with that.

lines.speaker: Tomas
lines.line: Fair enough. What kind of work?

lines.speaker: EVE
lines.line: The kind that makes money. You should try it sometime, blacksmith.
